Remote diagnostics

Get clarity quicker, refer smarter.

Extend what a referring GP or clinic can already do — and when a referral is still the right call, send it onward with real diagnostic information attached, not a question mark.

Holter monitoring · CIED support · Remote monitoring

Co-chair and board director, International Board of Heart Rhythm Examiners

Get in touch

What we offer

Three services. One clear finding at the end of each.

Holter monitoring

Ambulatory rhythm capture, read and resolved into a clear finding.

CIED support

Device-clinic support for pacemakers and implanted cardiac devices.

Remote monitoring

Ongoing vigilance between visits — signal watched, not just stored.

Verified result

Reserved for pilot outcomes — added here once verified, in the same format as a resolved measurement (e.g. site · period · result).

Verified result

Reserved for pilot outcomes — added here once verified, in the same format as a resolved measurement (e.g. site · period · result).

The shift

From “outsource the workload” to “extend the clinic.”

The value isn't taking work off your desk — it's giving a referring clinician more of the picture, sooner. Clearer information up front means smarter referrals: the right patient sent onward at the right moment, with the data that makes the next step obvious.

Deliberately brief. The specifics — fitting, workflow, sign-off — are a conversation, not a web page. Tell us what you're seeing and we'll take it from there.

Clarity quicker. Referrals smarter.

If that's the kind of help your patients could use, let's talk.
